title: Date Blocker - Timeline and Dependencies Function
excerpt: Cannot find the answer to this anywhere - but Monday.com has a timeline tool and so I figure this MUST be possible. I want to put dates into the admin somehow so that it blocks out working on public holidays, xmas, new y…

posts.author: Sambapcor (Sam Oakley)
posts.cookedHtml: Cannot find the answer to this anywhere - but Monday.com has a timeline tool and so I figure this MUST be possible. I want to put dates into the admin somehow so that it blocks out working on public holidays, xmas, new years day etc? When you consider Smartsheet or MS Project, these allow this action, so that your timeline ensures accuracy and doesn’t have people working over xmas! How can we make this work within Monday.com?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Sambapcor,

Thanks for posting about this and welcome to the community!

This is a function that we don’t have at the moment, I’m afraid, but are looking into. It involves changes in a lot of areas of the platform (timeline, workload view, deadlines, dependencies, etc.) but is definitely something we want to prioritize. I can understand how useful it’d be to block out public holidays, Christmas, etc! I’ve passed your feedback to my team to see if we can prioritize it further and will continue to advocate for a feature like this internally.

We originally had a plan to release a feature like this in Q4 of this year but it may be pushed back.

If you’d like workarounds for avoiding these holidays/making sure your timeline is accurate, please don’t hesitate to write to us at support@monday.com

posts.author: Dganit (Dganit Sofer Levinson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
is there any progress for this feature?
did it enter this year’s prioritization?
this is really an essential feature for Project Planning.

thanks,
Dganit

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Dganit—welcome to the community

I understand this is an important feature for project planning. I’ve passed your and @Sambapcor’s feedback on to the team! It looks like the team is reviewing this as a possible feature to develop, but no ETA or definitive commitment on developing it. I am hoping your feedback will help prioritize the issue.

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi is there development regarding this feature? It would be soooooo helpful !!

thanks!

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Izobelle

We still do not have an ETA to provide on when this ability will be available, something you can do in the meantime to voice your support of this addition would be to vote for this feature in the Feedback Section of our Community and even comment showing your own use case and why it would be important to add!

Here is a post I found that you can vote for in the meantime: Vote Holiday/Blackout days in Timeline/Gantt Views

These are taken into consideration when we look at changes and additions to make to the platform, so thank you all for sharing your thoughts and feedback!

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: greiser (Gila Reiser)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, is there any update on this functionality? It is really important for our business to utilize this functionality as it is basic in the project management world. If this is not something Monday.com can develop soon we will need to look into other Project Management tools.

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: It is an important functionality I hope Monday is considering it. I found a work around as we used it for HR purposes and block public holidays.

posts.author: EmilyPrice (Emily Price)
posts.cookedHtml: Would you mind sharing the work around?

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone

We are currently providing early access to an app which does all these and more.
Here are some of the features of the app:

Built-in holiday checker for most countries
Ability to define holidays for users in your account
Set non-working days
Support for native monday automations
Date and timeline support
Support for teams holidays
And so much more…

To get early access to the app, please fill this form - Date Check - Early Access

Here is a demo of the app in action.

If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: EmilyG (Emily Greines)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on blackout date functionality in Monday? It’s been years with many people flagging the need of this basic functionality but haven’t heard of an update. Why should we pay a third party to do something that Monday should be able to do?

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am sorry I was on mat leave! Sure we use Monday as our ‘‘HR’’ system so some days have to blocked and people are in different countries.

Thanks,

posts.author: Kim1988 (Kim van der Wijk #monday ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Why in the name is this on the long term roadmap?! That is crazy. I worked very hard to get Monday integrated in our organisation and now I cannot get basic things done without asking for more budget to add apps to get done what is a basic need in planning. Please reply

posts.author: lawsonmy (Myisha )
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this feature? It is EXTREMELY important in being able to create a project schedule.

posts.author: Mary3 (Mary Monday)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this yet? It’s been 4 years since it was promised that you were developing it…

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: Same here ! We use the system as an HR system but its so annying to calculate vacations days when there is a public holiday we have to do 2 demands
